prompt: Create a realistic vertical lifestyle fashion portrait of an East Asian adult female over 21 years old, standing inside a vintage commuter train or an old-fashioned bus on a bright sunny day, next to a large open window. The composition spans from her upper thighs to her head, positioned slightly to the right. Her torso faces the camera while her hips are angled slightly toward the window, creating a relaxed S-curve. She leans gently against the beige interior wall below the window, with her arms outstretched—one hand on the metal windowsill to the left and the other on the window frame to the right. Her shoulders are relaxed, and she gazes directly at the camera with a warm, confident expression and a subtle, natural smile. She has long deep brown hair with soft layers and a slight side part. A strong gust of wind blows through the open window, dramatically sweeping her hair toward the right side of the frame. In the sunlight, several strands of hair glisten as they flutter; fine wisps scatter softly across her forehead, cheeks, and shoulders as her long hair sways gently. Her makeup is refined and natural: fair, translucent skin, soft peach blush, well-defined brows, light brown eyeliner, long curled lashes, subtle contouring, and a soft rose-pink lip gloss. She is wearing a cropped light ivory top made of thin, semi-transparent fabric dotted with tiny peach or coral spots. The top features short puff sleeves with soft elastic cuffs, a deep V-neck wrap design, pleated stitching, and a tie knot at the front, revealing just the right amount of skin at the waist. This is paired with slim-fit dark indigo denim shorts featuring a high-waisted design, rolled hems, gold contrast stitching, belt loops, metal buttons, front pockets, and a small embroidered detail near one pocket. The denim should exhibit realistic fading, stitching, texture, and slight wrinkling around the hips. The scene should simulate the interior of an old train car or vintage public transport, such as beige metal wall panels, exposed screws and seams, a large rectangular sliding window with brushed aluminum trim, and a dark navy blue vinyl bench visible in the lower right. Through the open window, a sunny suburban street scene is visible: light-colored buildings, lush greenery, roadside scenery, and soft-toned vehicles, all rendered with a shallow depth of field and slight directional motion blur to suggest the vehicle is in motion. Strong natural light streams in from the upper left and behind the subject. Soft rim lighting is created around her hair and shoulders, with bright highlights on her cheekbones, arms, waist, shirt, and jeans, filled in by soft reflected light from the light-colored interior panels. Subtle shadows under the chin, around the waist, and in the folds of the clothing are preserved to enhance depth. The overall atmosphere should be fresh, breezy, and summery, natural yet slightly nostalgic, like a sophisticated travel photograph taken during a daytime trip. Camera and Composition: Vertical 2:3, eye-level or slightly low angle, approximately 50mm lens, shallow depth of field with the subject in sharp focus and the exterior softly blurred, subtle movement in the hair and background, realistic perspective, balanced frame, with the large window forming a bright rectangular frame around her. Maintain natural human anatomy, realistic hands and fingers, accurate fabric textures, fine skin texture, and cinematic color grading using warm ivory, sunny beige, dark indigo, soft greens, and pale peaches. Style: Realistic travel photography, adult model, breezy train window portrait, bright natural sunlight, wind-blown hair, white tie-front crop top, dark denim shorts, vintage subway interior, natural summer vibe, realistic skin and fabric textures, high detail, clean composition, no text, no watermarks, no logos, no other people, no distorted anatomy, no duplicate limbs, no artificial plastic skin, no cartoon or illustration style, no harsh flash, no excessive blurring, no explicit nudity.
promptEn: Create a realistic vertical lifestyle fashion portrait of an East Asian adult female over 21 years old, standing inside a vintage commuter train or an old-fashioned bus on a bright sunny day, next to a large open window. The composition spans from her upper thighs to her head, positioned slightly to the right. Her torso faces the camera while her hips are angled slightly toward the window, creating a relaxed S-curve. She leans gently against the beige interior wall below the window, with her arms outstretched—one hand on the metal windowsill to the left and the other on the window frame to the right. Her shoulders are relaxed, and she gazes directly at the camera with a warm, confident expression and a subtle, natural smile. She has long deep brown hair with soft layers and a slight side part. A strong gust of wind blows through the open window, dramatically sweeping her hair toward the right side of the frame. In the sunlight, several strands of hair glisten as they flutter; fine wisps scatter softly across her forehead, cheeks, and shoulders as her long hair sways gently. Her makeup is refined and natural: fair, translucent skin, soft peach blush, well-defined brows, light brown eyeliner, long curled lashes, subtle contouring, and a soft rose-pink lip gloss. She is wearing a cropped light ivory top made of thin, semi-transparent fabric dotted with tiny peach or coral spots. The top features short puff sleeves with soft elastic cuffs, a deep V-neck wrap design, pleated stitching, and a tie knot at the front, revealing just the right amount of skin at the waist. This is paired with slim-fit dark indigo denim shorts featuring a high-waisted design, rolled hems, gold contrast stitching, belt loops, metal buttons, front pockets, and a small embroidered detail near one pocket. The denim should exhibit realistic fading, stitching, texture, and slight wrinkling around the hips. The scene should simulate the interior of an old train car or vintage public transport, such as beige metal wall panels, exposed screws and seams, a large rectangular sliding window with brushed aluminum trim, and a dark navy blue vinyl bench visible in the lower right. Through the open window, a sunny suburban street scene is visible: light-colored buildings, lush greenery, roadside scenery, and soft-toned vehicles, all rendered with a shallow depth of field and slight directional motion blur to suggest the vehicle is in motion. Strong natural light streams in from the upper left and behind the subject. Soft rim lighting is created around her hair and shoulders, with bright highlights on her cheekbones, arms, waist, shirt, and jeans, filled in by soft reflected light from the light-colored interior panels. Subtle shadows under the chin, around the waist, and in the folds of the clothing are preserved to enhance depth. The overall atmosphere should be fresh, breezy, and summery, natural yet slightly nostalgic, like a sophisticated travel photograph taken during a daytime trip. Camera and Composition: Vertical 2:3, eye-level or slightly low angle, approximately 50mm lens, shallow depth of field with the subject in sharp focus and the exterior softly blurred, subtle movement in the hair and background, realistic perspective, balanced frame, with the large window forming a bright rectangular frame around her. Maintain natural human anatomy, realistic hands and fingers, accurate fabric textures, fine skin texture, and cinematic color grading using warm ivory, sunny beige, dark indigo, soft greens, and pale peaches. Style: Realistic travel photography, adult model, breezy train window portrait, bright natural sunlight, wind-blown hair, white tie-front crop top, dark denim shorts, vintage subway interior, natural summer vibe, realistic skin and fabric textures, high detail, clean composition, no text, no watermarks, no logos, no other people, no distorted anatomy, no duplicate limbs, no artificial plastic skin, no cartoon or illustration style, no harsh flash, no excessive blurring, no explicit nudity.
promptZh: 创作一张逼真的竖构图生活时尚人像，主角为一位 21 岁以上的东亚成年女性，站在阳光明媚的复古通勤火车或老式巴士内，靠在一扇打开的大窗户旁。构图范围从她的大腿上部到头部，位置略微偏右。她的躯干面向镜头，臀部微微转向窗户，形成自然的 S 型曲线。她轻轻倚靠在窗下米色的内壁上，双臂伸展——一只手放在左侧的金属窗台上，另一只手放在右侧的窗框上。她肩膀放松，直视镜头，表情温暖自信，带着微妙、自然的微笑。她留着深棕色的长发，带有柔和的层次感和轻微的侧分。一阵强风从打开的窗户吹入，戏剧性地将她的头发吹向画面右侧。在阳光下，几缕发丝随风飘动时闪闪发光；细碎的发丝轻柔地散落在她的额头、脸颊和肩膀上，长发随风轻轻摇曳。她的妆容精致自然：白皙透亮的皮肤、柔和的桃色腮红、轮廓分明的眉毛、浅棕色眼线、纤长卷翘的睫毛、微妙的修容以及柔和的玫瑰粉色唇彩。她穿着一件浅象牙色的短款上衣，采用薄而半透明的面料制成，上面点缀着细小的桃色或珊瑚色圆点。上衣采用短泡泡袖设计，配有柔软的松紧袖口、深 V 领裹身设计、褶皱缝线以及前襟打结，在腰部露出了恰到好处的肌肤。搭配修身深靛蓝色牛仔短裤，采用高腰设计、卷边裤脚、金色撞色缝线、腰带环、金属纽扣、前口袋以及口袋附近的小刺绣细节。牛仔裤应展现出逼真的褪色、缝线、纹理以及臀部周围的轻微褶皱。场景应模拟老式火车车厢或复古公共交通工具的内部，例如米色金属壁板、外露的螺丝和接缝、带有拉丝铝饰边的矩形大推拉窗，右下角可见深海军蓝色的乙烯基长椅。透过打开的窗户，可以看到阳光明媚的郊区街道：浅色的建筑、郁郁葱葱的绿植、路边风景以及色调柔和的车辆，所有这些都以浅景深和轻微的定向运动模糊呈现，暗示车辆正在行驶中。强烈的自然光从左上方和主体后方射入。她的头发和肩膀周围形成了柔和的轮廓光，颧骨、手臂、腰部、衬衫和牛仔裤上有明亮的高光，并由浅色内壁反射的柔和光线填充。下巴下方、腰部周围以及衣褶处的微妙阴影被保留，以增强深度感。整体氛围应清新、凉爽且充满夏日气息，自然而略带怀旧感，就像白天旅行时拍摄的精致旅行照片。相机与构图：竖构图 2:3，平视或略微低角度，约 50mm 镜头，浅景深，主体清晰对焦，背景柔和模糊，头发和背景有微妙的运动感，透视真实，画面平衡，大窗户在她周围形成一个明亮的矩形框架。保持自然的人体解剖结构、逼真的手部和手指、准确的织物纹理、细腻的皮肤质感，并使用暖象牙色、阳光米色、深靛蓝色、柔和绿色和淡桃色进行电影级调色。风格：写实旅行摄影、成年模特、凉爽的火车窗边人像、明亮的自然阳光、风吹发丝、白色前系带短款上衣、深色牛仔短裤、复古地铁内饰、自然的夏日氛围、逼真的皮肤和织物纹理、高细节、构图干净、无文字、无水印、无 Logo、无其他人、无扭曲的解剖结构、无重复肢体、无人工塑料感皮肤、非卡通或插画风格、无强闪光、无过度模糊、无露骨裸露。
